summary: Tightened qd report validation so required completion and audit report content fields must contain non-empty strings or required arrays, then recorded negative and full-repo validation evidence for the stricter contract.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Completion reports require non-empty summary, non-empty changedFiles[], non-empty acceptanceEvidence[], non-empty commandsRun[], non-empty evidence[], and non-empty realWorldValidation.evidence.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh now requires length > 0 for those completion report fields; evidence/m4-qd-report-required-content-contract/negative-smoke-empty-summary.log confirms an empty summary is rejected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Completion acceptanceEvidence[] objects require non-empty criterion, status, and evidence; commandsRun[] objects require non-empty command, status, and evidence.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh now validates non-empty nested strings for completion acceptance evidence and command objects.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Audit reports require non-empty acceptanceReviewed[], non-empty realWorldValidation.evidence, and non-empty criterion, status, and evidence inside acceptanceReviewed[].
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh now validates non-empty audit review arrays, non-empty real-world evidence, and non-empty nested audit review strings.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-required-content-contract/qd-reports-check.log records `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check` passing with this node's reports included.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for at least one empty required content field.
No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy negative smoke test with completion summary set to an empty string

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; no product runtime behavior is changed or claimed.
